titleStmt.title: SII 6.1076: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1076. (A.R. No. 334 of 1899). IN THE SAME NICHE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1338 gunēṁṭi śrāvaṇa kṛṣṇa sapta
mi bhudavaranāḍu Oḍadi Arjjunudēvaraju kuṁtuṟu maṁkamadē
vi koḍuku ArjamarajuraUturayaḍu tanaku Abhīṣṭarttasiddhi
gānu śrīnarasiṁhyanaduniki nityamunnu veluṁganu Ākhaṁḍadīpa
O 1 mapaṭi dupaAvasaramaṁdu triguṇi Anavala kalasa O 1 cama
rppiṁcenu I Akaṁḍadīpanaku khilāri guṁṭupariI koḍku Eṟuvarivasa
nanu mōdalu 50 peṭiri I nijōgi kuḍujītānaku Oḍadi dutaḍanu polamu
puṭaṁḍu viliciveṭiri Itaḍu nelaku neI kuṁcalu 7 . nagarabaḍārana teci
kolayaṁgalāḍu Anavāla kalasaku caṁdukilāri koḍku Anipaḍirāyanivasa
nanu mōdalu muppa 30 peṭiri I nijōgi kuḍujītanaku dutaḍanu polamu pu
(pu)ṭaḍu peṭiri Iduṟu nijōgulunnu I palakalasanu I Akaṁḍadīpana neI te
cipeṭaṁgalaḍu AsaṁdrārkkastaIga Idaṟu peṭagalāṟu tirumajanamu
Avasaramaṁdu maḷlivaradayagaraya O 1 teci peṭaṁgalāḍu I prasada ku
1 gaṁḍamaḍalu 5 peṭi garaya 30 tiruma(ṁ)jyanagaraya tesipeṭanu
ṟēpaṭi dūpakālana goḍaU pāṭa(ṁ)nu bāticēlumahāsēnāpati kuṁca prasa
danakai Aṁtakapali jalakṣētra paṁdumu peṭitimi I dharmmu śrī
vaiṣṇava rakṣa śrī śrī śrī padmanidi varadaya maṁdagaraya
kuṁcā samaṁdu baṁḍarana pavēsa baṁkalu 10 . peṭenu .
Digital edition of SII 6.1076 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
